---
name: ❓ Question / Help
about: Ask a question about installing, configuration, or using WexSay.
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question, support
assignees: ""
---

**What is your question?**
Please state your question clearly and provide any relevant context.

**Relevant Environment Details**
* Device Brand & Model: [e.g. Google Pixel 6]
* Android OS Version: [e.g. Android 12]
* WexSay App Version: [e.g. v1.0.0-beta.2]

**Additional Details**
If you have screenshots showing the screen or menu your question relates to, please attach them here.
